sentences.text: Thank you for calling Greenwood and McKenzie please listen carefully to the following extensions as our options have changed our office hours are Monday to Friday eight AM to five PM if you are a current commercial tenant and this is an after hour emergency regarding the building dial two now, otherwise please call back during normal business hours and we will be happy to assist you to reach Alex sender Linda, please dial one zero four for again McKenzie dial one zero six for call Greenwood dial one zero five for the residential department, please contact Maria Villa at extension one zero eight or Veronica breakfast at extension one zero two or Rosie Rodriguez one one one for commercial please hold while your call is being transferred to Rosie Rodriguez. This is Rosie with Greenwood and McKenzie. Please leave your name and number and I will return your call as soon as possible. Thank you. After the tone please record your message. When finished you may hang up to deliver the message or press pound for more options.

guys. Um, I noticed some vacancies like Canyon Woods Mary post, Tara Tustin Pine Wood wasn't sure who the right contact would be but if you just keep an eye on your inbox. I'll send over a quick email to try to schedule some time with you would love to hear back thanks so much.
